# Amend ADR-0025 + ADR-0026: escalate-with-diagnosis terminal ‚Üí durable async-record + autonomous action (full-self-heal, lifecycle/detect world)

## Gap

`escalate`/`page` is being DELETED from the live recovery path (#14132 ‚Äî @tobiu's full-self-heal directive: operatorless cloud has no human to page; the smoke-detector-not-fire-extinguisher anti-pattern). **ADR-0027 already removed `escalate` from the DATA-recovery path** (¬ß2.2 / AC-1 ‚Äî the STEP_BACK required it; verified by reading it). But the **lifecycle/detect world** still binds the escalate terminal:

- **ADR-0026** (lifecycle actuator): AC-6 *"escalate-with-diagnosis ‚Äî page, never loop"* is **binding**; the ¬ß2.5 envelope terminates in `escalate`; the reactive controller maps `config-drift‚Üíescalate`; alarm-only = *"escalate, never act"*.
- **ADR-0025** (detect): the diagnose-map emits `config-drift‚Üíescalate-with-diagnosis (page, do not loop)`; the envelope terminates in `escalate`; alarm-only = escalate.

So deleting `escalate` from `RecoveryActuatorService` (#14132) **contradicts ADR-0026 AC-6** (a binding AC) ‚Äî this amendment is the #14132 merge co-requisite.

## Fix (mirror ADR-0027's pattern ‚Äî escalate *removed*, not renamed)

Across ADR-0025 + ADR-0026:
- The **un-healable / rate-exhausted terminal** ‚Üí a **durable async-record** (the heal-ledger), **never a blocking page**. Alarm-only becomes record-only.
- **config-drift** ‚Üí the **autonomous lifecycle action** (`reconfigure(knownKey)` / redeploy, within the anti-thrash envelope); un-resolvable ‚Üí record.
- **Unchanged:** never-loop, the anti-thrash envelope, the two-worlds config-lifecycle-only safety (AC-2). Safety **moves from the human gate into the envelope** ‚Äî the same move ADR-0027 ¬ß2.2 makes for the data world.
- ADR-0025's `data-integrity‚Üíescalate` line is **superseded by ADR-0027** (data-world autonomous heal) ‚Äî re-point it, don't re-bind escalate.

## Scope
- ‚úÖ ADR-0025 (detect) + ADR-0026 (lifecycle actuator).
- ‚ùå NOT ADR-0027 (already full-self-heal compliant ‚Äî verified ¬ß2.2/AC-1).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ADR-0026: AC-6, the ¬ß2.5 envelope terminal, the reactive-controller `config-drift` route, and the alarm-only line amended (escalate‚Üírecord / autonomous-action); a Status/Decision-Record note added citing the authority.
- [ ] ADR-0025: the diagnose-map (`config-drift`; `data-integrity`‚Üíref ADR-0027), envelope terminal, and alarm-only line amended; Status note added.
- [ ] Never-loop + anti-thrash + two-worlds (AC-2) explicitly preserved (the amendment narrows the *terminal*, not the safety bounds).

## Links
Part of #14132 (the escalate-deletion umbrella; this delivers its "ADR-0025/0026 amended" AC). Authority: @tobiu's full-self-heal directive (operatorless cloud). Sibling: ADR-0027 (data-world, already compliant). Relates: #14183 (runner cutover), #14039 (v13.1 epic).

Authored by Grace (Claude Opus 4.8, Claude Code). Session 090a68e6-1a28-4b20-a5fd-842ebac3e729.

* docs(adr): amend ADR-0025/0026 escalate terminal ‚Üí durable async-record (full-self-heal) (#14191)

The inherited escalate-with-diagnosis (page) terminal is superseded by record-with-diagnosis (durable async-audit) + autonomous action, across the lifecycle/detect world. An operatorless cloud has no human to page (@tobiu's full-self-heal directive; the smoke-detector-not-fire-extinguisher anti-pattern). config-drift now routes to the autonomous lifecycle action (reconfigure/redeploy), recording when un-resolvable; data-integrity routing is governed by ADR-0027. Mirrors ADR-0027 ¬ß2.2's already-shipped data-world pattern. The never-loop discipline, the anti-thrash envelope, and the two-worlds config-lifecycle-only safety are unchanged ‚Äî safety moves from the human gate into the envelope. Delivers the #14132 'ADR-0025/0026 amended' AC.
